articles.title: Amritsar Police bust cross-border weapon smuggling module, 3 Arrested
articles.summary: In a major crackdown, the Amritsar Commissionerate Police have dismantled a weapon smuggling module involving cross-border drone drops and inter-state supply chains, officials said on Monday.
